task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete plan I've designed:

---

## Plan: Custom Theme System (5 files, no new deps)

### What I Found

The codebase has a working **`light | dark | system` toggle** (`useTheme.ts`) that applies a `.dark` CSS class to `<html>`. All colors are CSS custom properties (`--background`, `--foreground`, etc.) in `index.css`. Critically, properties set via `element.style.setProperty()` **override** stylesheet rules â€” this is how the new theme system applies colors without editing CSS.

`packages/shared` uses source-first subpath exports, so adding a new module is just two things: a `.ts` file and a 3-line `package.json` entry.

---

### Files to Create (3)

1. **`packages/shared/src/themes.ts`** â€” `ThemeColors` + `Theme` interfaces; three named theme constants (`T3_DARK`, `T3_LIGHT`, `T3_MIDNIGHT`); `BUILT_IN_THEMES` array; `DEFAULT_THEME` (avoids `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` issues); `listThemes()` and `getTheme(id)`. Pure data, no browser/Node APIs.

2. **`apps/web/src/hooks/useCustomTheme.ts`** â€” Mirrors `useTheme.ts`'s `useSyncExternalStore` pattern exactly. Storage key: `t3code:custom-theme`. `applyTheme()` sets ~10 CSS custom properties on `documentElement.style`, toggles `.dark` class, applies font settings to `body.style`. Runs on module load (flash prevention). Exports `useCustomTheme()` â†’ `{ theme, setTheme, availableThemes }`.

3. **`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** â€” Radio-group with color swatches (3 rounded circles per row: background/foreground/accent). Reuses exact CSS class patterns from the existing Appearance section in settings.

### Files to Modify (2)

4. **`packages/shared/package.json`** â€” Add `"./themes"` subpath export (3 lines).

5. **`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** â€” Import `ThemeSelector`, add a "Color Theme" sub-section inside the existing `Appearance <section>` after the light/dark/system toggle, separated by `border-t`.

### Verification
- `bun typecheck` + `bun lint` must pass
- Manual: Settings â†’ Appearance â†’ three themes with swatches; select changes colors live; persists on reload; syncs across tabs
